description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian with a medium build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. The individual is dressed in a casual, loose-fitting hoodie with a subtle tie-dye effect and matching jogger-style pants. The hoodie features a front pocket and a drawstring hood, while the pants are tapered at the ankles. The person is wearing low-profile sneakers, suitable for walking or urban environments. The hairstyle is long and voluminous, pulled back into a high ponytail with defined waves. The facial features are stylized, and the overall appearance suggests a relaxed, everyday urban look.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian in a hoodie and joggers, standing upright with a high ponytail and sneakers. The style is relaxed and suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, hoodie details, and front pocket, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, ponytail, and the side seam of the outfit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hoodie, ponytail, and the fit of the joggers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, ponytail, and the side of the sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hoodie and jogger pants set with a relaxed fit
